debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hψ : ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hφψ : χ ➝ φ ⋏ ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ₁ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode (φ ⋏ ψ))
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
have consistent (i : ℕ) (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i) :
      Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    induction i generalizing Δ with
    | zero =>
      simp [construction] at hΔ
      have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
        | empty =>
          simp
obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := Set.mem_iUnion.mp hψ
let Λ := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)

have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
    simp [S]

have consistent (k : ℕ) (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hS : ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k) : S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    induction k generalizing S with
    | zero =>
      simp [construction] at hS

let S := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)
  have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ U := by
    simp only [Finset.coe_insert, Set.insert_subset_iff]
    exact ⟨hφ, hψ, λ x hx => monotone_construction (le_add_right _ _) (hΓ₁ hx)⟩
  
  let Im := S.image encode
  have hIm : Im.Nonempty := Finset.nonempty_image_iff.mpr (Finset.insert_nonempty _ _)
  obtain ⟨δ, hδ, hmax⟩ : ∃ δ ∈ S, ∀ x ∈ S, encode x ≤ encode δ := by
    let m := Im.max' hIm
    have hm : m ∈ Im := Finset.max'_mem _ _
    obtain ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_image.mp hm
    refine ⟨d, hd, λ x hx => Finset.le_max' _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ hx)⟩

  have h_subset : ↑(S.erase δ) ⊆ construction T hT (encode δ) := by
    intro γ hγ
    rw [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_erase] at hγ
    have h_lt : encode γ < encode δ := lt_of_le_of_ne (hmax γ hγ.2) (λ h => hγ.1 (encode_injective h))
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := by simpa [U, construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using hS_sub hγ.2
    
    have : γ ∈ construction T hT (encode γ + 1) := by
      rcases lt_or_le k (encode γ + 1) with h | h
      . exact monotone_construction (le_of_lt h) hk
      . induction k, h using Nat.le_induction with
        | base => exact hk
        | succ n _ ih =>
          dsimp [construction] at ih
          split at ih
          . rename_i δ' h_eq
            split_ifs at ih with h_if
            . rcases (Set.mem_insert_iff.mp ih) with rfl | h_in
              . rw [←encode_eq_iff.mpr h_eq] at *
                have : n > encode γ := Nat.lt_of_succ_le (by assumption)
                have : n ≠ encode γ := ne_of_gt this
                contradiction
              . exact h_in
            . exact ih
          . exact ih

    exact monotone_construction (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h_lt) this

  have h_imp : (S.erase δ).conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
    apply T.imp_closed (φ := S.conj)
    . simp [S]

have consistent (i) (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i) : Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    induction i generalizing Δ with
    | zero =>
      simp [construction] at hΔ

have hS_sub : ↑S ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by
    intro γ hγ

  have hΔ_imp : Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by

  have h_mem_step : ∀ σ ∈ U, σ ∈ construction T hT (encode σ + 1) := by

    . apply monotone_construction (Nat.zero_le _)
      simpa [construction]
    . simp [construction]

  have hΔ_sub : ↑Δ ⊆ construction_omega T hT := by

    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | hx
    . exact hφ

have consistent : ∀ i (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑S ⊆ construction T hT i → S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    intro i S hS
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      simp [construction] at hS
      have : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction S using Finset.induction_on with
        | empty => simp

have exists_stage : ∃ k, ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT k := by
    induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
    | empty => use 0
let Δ := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)

let S := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)
  obtain ⟨N, hSN⟩ : ∃ N, ↑S ⊆ construction T hT N := by
    obtain ⟨nφ, hnφ⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hφ
    obtain ⟨nψ, hnψ⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hψ
    use (nφ + nψ + (encode (φ ⋏ ψ)) + 1)
    intro x hx
    simp [S] at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | hx
    . exact monotone_construction (by simp_arith) hnφ
    . exact monotone_construction (by simp_arith) hnψ
    . exact monotone_construction (by simp_arith) (hΓ₁ hx)

  have consistent (n) (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hS : ↑S ⊆ construction T hT n) :
      S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    induction n generalizing S with
    | zero =>
      intro hImp
      have : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction S using Finset.induction with
        | empty => simp
obtain ⟨n1, hn1⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using hφ

let consistent (S : Set (Formula ℕ)) := ∀ Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Δ ⊆ S → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory
  have h_cons : ∀ i, consistent (construction T hT i) := by
    intro i

obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hφ
  obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hψ
  let n := encode (φ ⋏ ψ)
  let k := max i (max j n)

  have hi_sub : construction T hT i ⊆ construction T hT k := monotone_construction (le_max_left _ _)
  have hj_sub : construction T hT j ⊆ construction T hT k := monotone_construction (le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_max_right _ _))
  have hn_sub : construction T hT n ⊆ construction T hT k := monotone_construction (le_trans (le_max_right _ _) (le_max_right _ _))

  have hφ : φ ∈ construction T hT k := hi_sub hi
  have hψ : ψ ∈ construction T hT k := hj_sub hj
  have hΓk : ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT k := Set.Subset.trans hΓ₁ hn_sub

  let Δ := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)
  have hΔ : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT k := by
    intro x hx
    simp [Δ] at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | hx
    . exact hφ
    . exact hψ
    . exact hΓk hx

  have h_incons : Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by
    apply T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ ⋏ ψ)
    . simp only [Δ, Finset.conj_insert]
      grind
    . exact hΓ₂

  let rec consistency (k : ℕ) : ∀ (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k → S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    match k with
    | 0 =>
      intro S hS
      have : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction S using Finset.induction with
        | empty =>
          simp
          apply T.mem_of_provable
          apply impId
        | insert a s ha ih =>
          simp at hS
          rw [Finset.conj_insert]
          have h1 : χ ➝ a ∈ T.theory := hS.1
          have h2 : χ ➝ s.conj ∈ T.theory := ih hS.2
          apply T.imp_closed (φ := χ ➝ s.conj)
          . apply T.imp_closed (φ := χ ➝ a)
            . grind
            . exact h1
          . exact h2
      intro h_abs
      apply hT
      apply T.mem_trans this h_abs
    | k + 1 =>
      intro S hS
      dsimp [construction] at hS
      split at hS
      . split_ifs at hS with h
        . rename_i δ hδ
          by_contra hC
          have : δ ∈ S := by
            by_contra h_notin
            have : ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k := by
              intro x hx
              have := hS hx
              simp at this
              cases this
              . subst ‹x = δ›
let S := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)

let S := insert φ (insert ψ Γ)
  have ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k, ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k := by
    obtain ⟨kφ, hφ⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using hφ
    obtain ⟨kψ, hψ⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega, Set.mem_iUnion] using hψ
    use kφ + kψ + encode (φ ⋏ ψ)
    intro x hx
    simp [S] at hx
    rcases hx with rfl | rfl | hx
    . apply monotone_construction (Nat.le_add_right _ _) hφ
    . apply monotone_construction (le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)) hψ
    . apply monotone_construction (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      trans construction T hT (encode (φ ⋏ ψ))
      . exact hΓ₁
      . apply monotone_construction (le_refl _)

  let rec consistent (k : ℕ) (S : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (hS : ↑S ⊆ construction T hT k) :
    S.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    match k with
    | 0 =>
      intro h
      have : χ ➝ S.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction S using Finset.induction with
        | empty =>
          simp

have consistent : ∀ i (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    intro i Δ hΔ hC

obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ : ∃ k, ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT k := by
    obtain ⟨iφ, hiφ⟩ := by simpa [construction_omega] using hφ

have consistent (i) (Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)) (h : ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT i) : Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
    induction i with
    | zero =>
      intro hC
      have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
        induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
        | empty => simp
